name: epi
description: Search and rank academic papers for an EPI wiki.

interface.shortDescription: v0.1.4 | Find, vet, source-audit, and hand off papers to PRW for formal wiki ingest.
interface.longDescription: EPI packages a Codex workflow for profile-driven academic paper discovery, source-first bundle preservation, MinerU parsing, optional reader/critic review, low-burden reading reports, Chinese-first approval reports, wiki handoff, final-source-review recording, and proposal-based quality evolution. It derives search terms, venue prior, ranking, and wiki/reader emphasis from the user's config plus the current request, blocks incomplete source bundles before final deposition, and prepares handoffs for an agent to write into the target Obsidian/LLM Wiki according to that vault's contract.
defaultPrompt: Prepare ranked papers through MinerU parse, source bundle audit, Chinese approval report, wiki handoff, and paper gate.
